description: A somewhat useful player sign-in plugin

## 1. Introduction

> PlayerSignIn —— A somewhat useful player sign-in plugin

1. Supports **MySQL** and local **SQLite** data storage
2. Automatically generates GUI sign-in interface based on the current month
3. Automatically displays special icons for weekdays, statutory holidays, and traditional Chinese festivals
4. Supports configuring daily sign-in rewards, consecutive sign-in rewards, and holiday rewards
5. Supports different reward tiers based on permissions
6. Supports sign-in rankings
7. Supports daily Chinese almanac fortune-telling (lucky/unlucky days)
8. More features to discover through experience

## 2. Prerequisites

**All optional**

PlaceholderAPI PAPI Variables
